sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «الصِّحَّةُ تَاجٌ عَلَى رُؤُوسِ الأَصِحَّاءِ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Zdravlje je kruna na glavama zdravih».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Health is a crown on the heads of the healthy».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصِّحَّةَ نِعْمَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ لَا نُقَدِّرُهَا إِلَّا حِينَ نَفْقِدُهَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da je zdravlje velika blagodat koju cijenimo tek kad je izgubimo.
sentences.translationEn: This means that health is a great blessing we only value when we lose it.

sentences.arabic: مَرِضَ صَالِحٌ أُسْبُوعًا كَامِلًا وَبَقِيَ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je bio bolestan cijelu sedmicu i ostao je kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Salih was sick for a full week and stayed at home.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ شَفِيَ قَرَّرَ الِاعْتِنَاءَ بِصِحَّتِهِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ قَبْلِ.
sentences.translation: Kad je ozdravio, odlučio je da više vodi brigu o svom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: When he recovered, he decided to take better care of his health.
